question.title: PR-A3 plan v2 micro-verification — iter-1'den 8 blocker + 9 warning fix
question.body: Plan v1 → v2 revizyonu tamamlandı. 8 blocker + 9 warning absorbe edildi. NB1–NB10 micro-verification. NB1: PATH hardening (realpath + policy-derived prefix anchor). NB2: inherit_from_parent=False strict + PATH fallback sırası. NB3: per-run evidence lock + monoton seq + canonical emission order. NB4: manifest PR-A5 CLI scope + docs bug-fix revise. NB5: event_id opaque (not ULID) + seq replay key. NB6: JSONPath minimal dotted subset. NB7: text/plain fallback triple gate. NB8: cross-ref per-call (no cache). NB9: 9 warning grouped. NB10: new blocker / ready_for_impl / PR split.
